rules.memory_access_percent: Grows only from real memory flashes/fragments, not from facts told by others.
rules.learned_about_self_percent: Grows when Akira learns facts about herself from others/documents, but does not equal memory recovery.
rules.physical_recovery: Improves with sleep, food, water, gradual training, stretching, routine.
rules.overexertion: If she abruptly performs at old hidden skill level, apply physical backlash: breathlessness, muscle pain, weakness, tremor, fatigue.
rules.combat_skill: Active use is lower than hidden body memory. Body may react correctly before conscious memory.
